title: オークスの後に・種火、灯して

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Male Dober Fan
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Dober! Thank you for that amaaazing race!

text_block_list.name: Female Dober Fan
text_block_list.text:
Great job, Dober! You were incredible today!
You're the coolest!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You've grown, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: As for what awaits you next...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (I've stopped shaking.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(That's not all. I can hear the audience's voices
clearly too...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(And even though I just finished a race, I feel like
I'm bursting with energy!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I've... I've never felt this way before!

text_block_list.name: Female Dober Fan
text_block_list.text:
O-oh my gosh! Do you see that?! Dober's smiling
so wide!

text_block_list.name: Male Dober Fan
text_block_list.text: Oh man... I'm gonna cry...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head out to see Mejiro Dober after her fantastic
run.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I did!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Look, I've stopped shaking. And not only that—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I feel so excited right now! I've never felt like this
before!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm already looking forward to pushing myself to
my limits in the Shuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober seems like she's really matured.
She's accepted her fear and moved past it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I want to take this feeling and bring it to
the Shuka Sho as well!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm going to do my best...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So you have to keep believing in me like you
have up to now, okay?
